name: AI-Powered Credit-Based Learning Platform - Figma File

children.name: 00_Cover
children.description: Project metadata and design system overview

children.content: Total Screens: 32 | States per Screen: 5 | Total Exports: 160
Created: April 8, 2026 | Framework: React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS

Total Screens: 32
Priority P0: 16 screens
Priority P1: 13 screens
Priority P2: 3 screens

Personas: 4 (Learner, Manager, Admin, Leadership)
Use Cases Covered: 8 (UC-001 to UC-008)
Prototype Flows: 8 (FL-001 to FL-008)

Components: 45+ atomic, molecular, and organism components
Design Tokens: Colors (9-shade primary/secondary), Typography (9 styles), Spacing (12 values)

Accessibility: WCAG 2.2 AA Compliant
Contrast Ratios: 4.5:1 (normal text), 3:1 (large text)

children.name: 01_Foundations
children.description: Design tokens from designsystem.md (colors, typography, spacing, radius, shadows)

children.content: Body Large - Prominent text, intro paragraphs
Body Small - Secondary text, helper text (14px)

children.name: 02_Components
children.description: Component library with all variants and states (45+ components)

children.name: C/Input/Search
children.description: Includes search icon prefix and clear icon suffix

children.name: C/Icon
children.description: 100+ icons from Heroicons or Lucide Icons library

children.name: C/Dropdown
children.description: Trigger + Menu + Options with keyboard navigation

children.name: C/HeaderNavigation
children.description: Logo + Nav Links + User Menu + Notifications + Search

children.name: C/SidebarNavigation
children.description: Menu items + Icons + Badge counts + Collapse toggle

children.name: C/BottomNavigation
children.description: Mobile-only navigation with 5 primary items max

children.name: C/Modal
children.description: Overlay + Header + Content + Footer + Close button

children.name: C/Chart/Bar
children.description: Bar chart with legend, axes, tooltips

children.name: C/LeaderboardList
children.description: Ranked items with avatars, names, scores, badges

children.name: C/CourseCard
children.description: Thumbnail + Title + Metadata + CTA + Progress bar

children.name: C/SkillGapHeatmap
children.description: Grid cells + Color scale legend + Tooltips

children.name: 03_Patterns
children.description: Reusable layout patterns built from components

children.name: Pattern_AuthForm
children.description: Centered card with logo, SSO button, optional forgot password link

children.name: Pattern_SearchFilter
children.description: Search bar + filter dropdowns + sort selector + result count

children.name: Pattern_ListPagination
children.description: List/grid of items + pagination controls + page size selector

children.name: Pattern_LoadingStateBlock
children.description: Skeleton screens or spinner with loading message

children.name: Pattern_ErrorStateBlock
children.description: Error icon + Message + Retry button + Support link

children.name: Pattern_FormSection
children.description: Section heading + Group of form fields + Divider

children.name: Pattern_DataTableActions
children.description: Bulk action dropdown + Search + Filter toggle + Export button

children.name: 04_Screens
children.description: All 32 screens with 5 states each (Default, Loading, Empty, Error, Validation)

children.name: 05_Prototype
children.description: Interactive flows wired by flow name (FL-001 to FL-008)

interactions.trigger: Click View Leaderboard from success modal
Advance to Step 4 of course creation

children.content:
All components must reference design tokens from designsystem.md. No hard-coded color/spacing values allowed.

Token Application:
- Colors: Use semantic tokens (primary-500, success-500) not hex codes
- Spacing: All spacing uses 8px grid multiples (spacing-2, spacing-4, spacing-6)
- Typography: Reference type scale tokens (heading-1, body, caption)
- Border Radius: Use radius tokens (radius-small, radius-medium, radius-large)
- Shadows: Apply elevation tokens (shadow-md, shadow-lg)

Accessibility Requirements:
- Contrast ratio 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text (WCAG 2.2 AA)
- Focus indicators 2px outline with 4px offset
- Touch targets minimum 44x44px
- Keyboard navigation for all interactive elements

Button Component:
- Props: variant (primary/secondary/tertiary/danger), size (small/medium/large), disabled, loading
- States: Default, Hover, Active, Focus, Disabled, Loading (6 states required)
- Accessible: aria-label for icon-only buttons, keyboard activation with Enter/Space

Input Component:
- Props: type (text/email/password/number), placeholder, value, onChange, error, disabled
- States: Default, Focus, Filled, Error, Disabled, Read-Only (6 states)
- Validation: Inline errors below field, red border on error state
- Accessible: Associated label (htmlFor), aria-invalid, aria-describedby for error messages

Data Table:
- Props: columns (array), data (array), sortable, filterable, pagination
- Features: Column sorting, multi-select rows, bulk actions, export
- Responsive: Stacks on mobile, card view for small screens
- Accessible: Table headers with scope, keyboard navigation with arrow keys

Modal:
- Props: isOpen, onClose, title, children, footer
- Behavior: Trap focus within modal, close on Esc key, backdrop click closes
- Accessible: aria-modal, focus management, announce with aria-live

Toast Notification:
- Props: type (success/error/warning/info), message, duration (default 5s)
- Behavior: Auto-dismiss after duration, manual dismiss with close button
- Accessible: aria-live region, screen reader announces message

Breakpoints:
- Mobile: 320px - 767px (4-column grid, bottom nav, stacked layouts)
- Tablet: 768px - 1023px (8-column grid, collapsible sidebar, hybrid nav)
- Desktop: 1024px+ (12-column grid, persistent sidebar, multi-column layouts)

Layout Adaptations:
- Sidebar Navigation: Desktop (persistent left sidebar 250px) → Tablet (overlay drawer) → Mobile (bottom navigation bar)
- Data Tables: Desktop (full table) → Tablet (scrollable with sticky headers) → Mobile (card view, stacked rows)
- Forms: Desktop (2-column) → Tablet (1-2 column adaptive) → Mobile (single column, full-width inputs)
- Modals: Desktop (centered 600px max-width) → Tablet (80% viewport width) → Mobile (full-screen overlay)
- Charts: Desktop (multi-chart dashboard) → Tablet (scrollable carousel) → Mobile (stacked, swipeable)

Typography Scaling:
- Mobile: Reduce heading sizes by 10-20% to prevent overflow
- Maintain 16px minimum for body text (prevent iOS auto-zoom)
- Increase line-height slightly on mobile for readability

Touch Targets:
- Mobile/Tablet: Minimum 44x44px tap targets with 8px spacing
- Desktop: Standard 40px buttons acceptable (pointer precision)

Asset Optimization:
- Export @2x for high-DPI screens
- Use srcset for responsive images
- Lazy load images below fold

Empty States:
- No courses enrolled: Show welcome illustration + CTA to browse learning paths
- No search results: Display 'No results found' + suggestion to reset filters
- No team members (manager): Show 'Your team roster is empty' + contact HR link

Error States:
- Network timeout: Display retry button + 'Check your connection' message
- API 500 error: Show 'Something went wrong' + contact support link
- Unauthorized (403): Redirect to login or show 'Access denied' message
- Validation errors: Inline red text below fields + red border on invalid inputs

Loading States:
- Dashboard: Skeleton screens for KPI cards + course cards (pulsing gray)
- Tables: Show loading spinner overlay + disable interactions
 - Long operations (>2s): Show progress bar or percentage complete

Overflow Handling:
- Long text (course titles): Truncate with ellipsis + tooltip on hover
- Large data sets: Virtualize tables (render only visible rows)
- Max file size: Show error if upload exceeds 500MB (videos) or 50MB (PDFs)

Concurrency:
- Stale data: Display 'Last updated: X minutes ago' timestamp
- Concurrent edits: Show conflict modal 'Another user modified this. Refresh?'
- Session expiry: Redirect to login + banner 'Session expired, please login again'

Accessibility Edge Cases:
- Keyboard-only navigation: Ensure all tooltips accessible via keyboard focus
- Screen reader: Announce dynamic content changes with aria-live regions
- Reduced motion: Disable animations when prefers-reduced-motion is set

Focus Order:
- Logical tab order follows visual flow (top to bottom, left to right)
- Skip to main content link at page top
- Modal/drawer focus trap (Tab cycles within, Esc closes)
- Return focus to triggering element when modal closes

ARIA Requirements:
- Buttons: aria-label for icon-only, aria-pressed for toggles
- Forms: aria-invalid, aria-describedby for errors, aria-required for required fields
- Live regions: aria-live for toast notifications and dynamic content updates
- Modals: aria-modal, role='dialog', aria-labelledby for title
- Tables: scope='col' for headers, caption for table description

Keyboard Navigation:
- All interactive elements reachable via Tab key
- Enter/Space activates buttons and toggles
- Arrow keys navigate within lists, tables, and menus
- Esc closes modals, dropdowns, and popovers
- Shift+Tab reverses tab order

Contrast Ratios (Verified):
- Normal text (#374151 on #FFFFFF): 8.9:1 ✅ Pass AAA
- Primary button (#FFFFFF on #0078D4): 4.64:1 ✅ Pass AA
- Error text (#EF4444 on #FFFFFF): 4.5:1 ✅ Pass AA
- Placeholder text (#9CA3AF on #FFFFFF): 3.5:1 ⚠️ Decorative only

Screen Reader Testing:
- Test with NVDA (Windows), JAWS (Windows), VoiceOver (macOS/iOS)
- Ensure all images have alt text (decorative images: alt='')
- Announce page title and heading hierarchy
- Dynamic content changes announced (aria-live)
- Form error messages read aloud

SCR-001 Login → LoginPage.tsx
- Components: AuthLayout, SSOButton, Logo
- Route: /login (public, no auth required)

SCR-002 Individual Dashboard → LearnerDashboard.tsx
- Components: DashboardLayout, KPICard, CourseCard, ProgressChart, TabGroup
- Route: /dashboard (auth required, role: Learner)

SCR-003 Global Leaderboard → Leaderboard.tsx
- Components: DataTable, Pagination, FilterDropdown, LeaderboardRow
- Route: /leaderboard (auth required)

SCR-005 Learning Path Browser → LearningPathBrowser.tsx
- Components: SearchBar, FilterSidebar, PathCard, EmptyState
- Route: /learning-paths (auth required, role: Learner)

SCR-007 Manager Dashboard → ManagerDashboard.tsx
- Components: DashboardLayout, KPICard, DataTable, SkillGapHeatmap, TabGroup
- Route: /manager/dashboard (auth required, role: Manager)

SCR-010 Course Player → CoursePlayer.tsx
- Components: VideoPlayer, ProgressBar, Sidebar (table of contents), Breadcrumb
- Route: /courses/:courseId/player (auth required, role: Learner)

SCR-013 Content Management → ContentManagement.tsx
- Components: DataTable, Modal, Form, FileUpload, TabGroup
- Route: /admin/content (auth required, role: Admin)

Component Library Structure:
- src/components/atoms/ (Button, Input, Checkbox, Badge, Avatar, Spinner)
- src/components/molecules/ (SearchBar, Dropdown, Card, Toast, ProgressBar, StatCard)
- src/components/organisms/ (Header, Sidebar, DataTable, Modal, Form, Chart)
- src/components/templates/ (DashboardLayout, AuthLayout)
- src/pages/ (LoginPage, LearnerDashboard, ManagerDashboard, etc.)

State Management:
- Global: Redux Toolkit slices (authSlice, userSlice, courseSlice)
- Component: React Hooks (useState, useReducer)
- Forms: React Hook Form (useForm, Controller)
- API: RTK Query (createApi, fetchBaseQuery)
